title: Core enumerations
description: Shared enumerations used across all domains in the private markets data model

Currency.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code. Restricted to currencies commonly encountered in private markets transactions. Used in all Money fields to denominate amounts. If a required currency is missing, extend this enum. Example: 'USD'

Region.description: Geographic region for classifying funds, deals, and assets by investment geography. Use 'GLOBAL' for multi-region strategies that are not concentrated in a single area. Aligns with common LP reporting and ILPA standards. Example: 'NORTH_AMERICA'

Country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (two uppercase letters). Used in addresses and for jurisdiction classification. Not restricted to an enum — any valid two-letter code is accepted. Examples: 'US', 'GB', 'KY' (Cayman Islands), 'LU' (Luxembourg)

DayCount.description: Day-count convention for calculating accrued interest on credit facilities and fixed-income instruments. Determines how the number of days in an interest period maps to the annual rate. ACT_360: actual days / 360 (common for SOFR/LIBOR loans). ACT_365: actual days / 365 (common in GBP markets). ACT_ACT: actual days / actual days in year. 30_360: assumes 30-day months / 360-day year (US convention). 30E_360: European 30/360 variant. Example: 'ACT_360'

DocumentType.description: Type of legal or operational document associated with a deal, fund, or trade. LPA: Limited Partnership Agreement (governing document of a fund). SIDE_LETTER: Supplemental terms negotiated by an individual LP. SUBSCRIPTION_AGREEMENT: LP's commitment to invest in a fund. CAPITAL_CALL_NOTICE: Notice to LPs to fund a portion of their commitment. DISTRIBUTION_NOTICE: Notice of proceeds returned to LPs. FINANCIAL_STATEMENT: Audited or unaudited financial statements. VALUATION_REPORT: Third-party or GP valuation of assets. TAX_DOCUMENT: K-1s, tax certificates, withholding forms. CREDIT_AGREEMENT: Loan or facility agreement. AMENDMENT: Modification to an existing agreement. WAIVER: Waiver of a covenant or contractual term. TRANSFER_AGREEMENT: Agreement to transfer an LP interest or asset. PURCHASE_AGREEMENT: Asset or equity purchase agreement. OTHER: Any document not covered above. Example: 'LPA'
